education.thesis: Industrial defect detection using computer vision and deep learning

projects.title: IIoT Quality Control System
projects.description: Built an industrial defect detection pipeline using YOLO and EfficientNet for weld and surface defect identification with real-time deployment capabilities.

projects.title: PlotPilot Multi-Agent Data Analysis System
projects.description: Developed a multi-agent framework for automated data analysis, visualization generation, and insight extraction using LLM-powered agents.

projects.title: Diagnovision
projects.description: AI-powered healthcare application for disease prediction and medical image analysis using deep learning models.

projects.title: Financial Advisor Agent
projects.description: Built an AI agent that predicts stock trends using machine learning and provides investment recommendations through a conversational interface.

publications.title: PlotPilot: Multi-Agent Framework for Automated Data Analysis and Visualization

internships.description: Developed GenAI-powered conversational AI systems, backend APIs, and enterprise automation solutions.

intro_call_summary: Student has strong practical experience in AI, machine learning, computer vision, and GenAI systems. Interested in pursuing research at the intersection of multimodal AI, computer vision, agentic systems, and large language models. Looking for research groups with strong industry collaboration and opportunities to work on real-world AI applications.
raw_resume: Akshayaa | B.Tech Artificial Intelligence and Data Science | CGPA: 8.31/10. Python Developer Intern at Gnani.ai. Research publication on PlotPilot multi-agent data analysis framework. Projects include IIoT Quality Control using YOLO and EfficientNet, Diagnovision healthcare AI platform, and AI-based financial advisor agent. Skills: Python, ML, DL, Computer Vision, GenAI, LLMs, Flask, SQL, Docker. Achievements: Caterpillar Hackathon Finalist, ScrollHack Finalist, Ideathon Winner.
